turns.content:
You are subagent gsd-planner. Create PLAN.md for Phase 23.1: Session-Tracker SDK Dispatch Investigation.

## Phase Context

- **Phase:** 23.1
- **Goal:** Fix race condition where sessionTracker.initialize() drops session.created events from delegate-task dispatch
- **SPEC.md:** `.planning/phases/23.1-session-tracker-sdk-investigation/23.1-SPEC.md` (3 requirements locked)
- **Investigation report:** `.planning/phases/23.1-session-tracker-sdk-investigation/23.1-SESSION-TRACKER-INVESTIGATION-2026-05-24.md` (316 lines, full root cause)
- **Mode:** Standard (not gap, not review)

## Root Cause (confirmed)

`plugin.ts:328` calls `void sessionTracker.initialize()` — fire-and-forget async. Critical deps (`eventCapture`, `pendingRegistry`, `childWriter`, `hierarchyIndex`) are assigned via `Object.assign(this, deps)` INSIDE the async initialize method. Any `onChildSessionCreated` callback from delegate-task dispatch that fires before `Object.assign` completes hits `handleSessionEvent()` guard at `index.ts:140` — short-circuits, silently drops the event. This is why U4/U5 failed 4 rounds of live UAT.

## Requirements (from SPEC.md)

### REQ-01 (PRIMARY): Sync dependency construction before delegation wiring
- Move sync `constructDependencies()` (or sync subset) before `setupDelegationModules()` in plugin.ts
- Files: `src/features/session-tracker/index.ts`, `src/features/session-tracker/initialization.ts`, `src/plugin.ts`
- Acceptance: onChildSessionCreated immediately after new SessionTracker() writes child .json

### REQ-02 (DEFENSIVE): Add warning log for skipped events  
- Add `[Harness] Session tracker: handleSessionEvent skipped — deps not initialized` at `src/features/session-tracker/index.ts:140`
- Acceptance: Log appears when event arrives before init complete

### REQ-03 (CLEANUP): Remove premature cleanup chain
- Remove `.then(() => sessionTracker.cleanup())` from `src/plugin.ts:328`
- Acceptance: Retry queue does not die after initialize completes

## Output

Write PLAN.md to: `.planning/phases/23.1-session-tracker-sdk-investigation/23.1-PLAN.md`

Use standard GSD plan format:
```markdown
---
phase: 23.1
plan: 01
wave: 1
autonomous: true
files_modified:
  - src/features/session-tracker/index.ts
  - src/features/session-tracker/initialization.ts
  - src/plugin.ts
requirements: [REQ-01, REQ-02, REQ-03]
---

## Tasks

### Task 1: [name]
<read_first>
- src/features/session-tracker/index.ts
- src/features/session-tracker/initialization.ts  
- src/plugin.ts
</read_first>
...
```

## Constraints
- Fix is SIMPLE: ~30 LOC, 3-4 files, no major restructuring
- Atomic commit
- npm run typecheck MUST pass
- npx vitest run tests/features/session-tracker/ MUST pass
- [Harness] prefix on new log messages
- No inline comments
- JSDoc on exports

(for resuming to continue this task if needed)
